findings.title: Stale mission-close regression is partially disabled by unreachable return
findings.rationale: The reviewed repair relies on stale mission-close and mission-close inclusion behavior being trustworthy, but `mission_close_review_ignores_stale_historical_execution_packages` returns before its integrated mission setup and mission-close review assertions. This leaves a material stale/repair routing regression path unexecuted and weakens the test-adequacy and review-honesty contract for the current repair bundle.
findings.suggested_next_action: Remove the early return or split the test into focused executable regressions, rerun the relevant runtime/qualification checks, and recompile a fresh review bundle for re-review.
